series.label: PortWatch 日通行量
series.caveat: PortWatch chokepoint6 霍尔木兹海峡日通行量，来自 AIS/GNSS 船舶信号反演；需注意 GPS 干扰、AIS 伪装、关闭 AIS 的船只和事后修订。覆盖期 2019-01-01 至 2026-05-10；最新日总通行 4 艘；油轮 2 艘；货船 2 艘；估算运力 450300。

series.label: PortWatch 7日均值

series.label: PortWatch 油轮通行量
series.caveat: PortWatch chokepoint6 霍尔木兹海峡油轮通行量，与总通行量同源；AIS/GNSS 局限同样适用。覆盖期 2019-01-01 至 2026-05-10

series.label: 美国 CPI 指数
series.caveat: FRED CPIAUCSL：美国城市消费者全项目 CPI 指数，单位为 Index 1982-1984=100、季节调整、月度发布。它不是同比通胀率百分比；通胀率需要用指数的百分比变化计算。 当前快照含官方空值：2025-10-01；图上标记缺值，不插值、不连线。

series.caveat: Brent spot proxy from FRED normalized local history; raw endpoint is not called by the UI.

series.caveat: WTI spot proxy from FRED normalized local history; raw endpoint is not called by the UI.

series.reason_hidden: FRED DEXCHUS is USD/CNY only; RMB bilateral FX is not rendered in Market charts or coverage.

series.label: Gold spot
series.caveat: Stooq XAU/USD daily OHLC history; Market chart uses Close as spot proxy, not an LBMA benchmark or futures continuous contract.

series.label: USD/CNH
series.caveat: Pending offshore CNH source; FRED DEXCHUS is USD/CNY only.
series.reason_hidden: No source-bound offshore CNH daily series is connected.
